title: MT5 direct-endpoint sanitized control evidence v6
$comment: Patch 7 lifecycle-aligned evidence contract. TCP accounting, ordered/QPC timeline arithmetic, authenticated probe-time bounds, lifecycle/pre-state/path bindings, manifest/plan/handoff digest recomputation, generic Unicode account-number sanitization, and comparisons between sibling values are enforced authoritatively by the runtime validator. timing and phase_markers are redundant assertions that must exactly match the timeline-derived values and ordered event codes.

network.$comment: process_scoped_tcp_flows must equal candidate_tcp_flows plus other_tcp_flows. Candidate/other are the sole mutually exclusive primary TCP classes. DNS and non-TCP events are separate counters. candidate_connected and candidate_block_observed are candidate disposition observations derived from the bound flow record set.
